# ISSS608 Group 10 Project Meeting Minutes Records

---

**Project Meeting 1:** Project Proposal, Project Methodology, Project Timeline

**Date:** 28 Feb 2026

**Time:** 3:45pm – 4.15pm

**In Attendance:** Ng Meng Ye, Chandru Kolanchiyappan, Gautamgovan Elangovan

[Click here to view meeting minutes - 1](https://visual-analytics-group-10-project.netlify.app/meetingminutes/projectmeeting1)

---

**Project Meeting 2:** Project Netlify, R Shiny dashboard modules, Data preparation

**Date:** 04 Mar 2026

**Time:** 3:45pm – 4.15pm

**In Attendance:** Ng Meng Ye, Chandru Kolanchiyappan, Gautamgovan Elangovan

---

**Project Meeting 3:** Project Netlify, R Shiny dashboard modules, User guide

**Date:** 21 Mar 2026

**Time:** 3:45pm – 4.15pm

**In Attendance:** Ng Meng Ye, Chandru Kolanchiyappan, Gautamgovan Elangovan

---
